title: Is Kaworu gay
wikitext:
[]: Is Kaworu gay? Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Nov 07, 2005 3:00 pm C'mon, is he? When I ask this question, I'm not asking about Tabris the seventeenth angel. Supposedly, angels have no gender, so they can't be gay. But, is Kaworu Nagisa gay? What do you think? _

[]: Post by Space Penis » Mon Nov 07, 2005 3:25 pm I always figured it was a kinda platonic love.

[]: Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Nov 07, 2005 3:54 pm I want to put this foward right now. Kaworu is certainly a peculiar character in Neon Genesis: Evangelion. He betrays Shinji and turns out to be his enemy. But, something that still puzles all fans alike is, "How does he love Shinji?" Kaworu is Adam, Adam was described by Gendou in episode 8 as, "The first human." Humans can have sexual status and gender. Thus, Kaworu is both angel and human. So, Kaworu can have a gender, he is male. So, he can have a sexual status. But is it a "love for everyone" type of love that Kaworu has or a lover's love? Well, we do have a couple hints of what it could be. So, what makes Kaworu's love a "lover's" love? For one, he makes sexual moves towards Shinji. Shinji: "I am going to bed." Kaworu: "With me?"

[]: Post by Titus » Mon Nov 07, 2005 3:58 pm Being of an Asuka kind of mind state, ill say this... Queer boy is gay. end of story

[]: Post by Heidroch » Mon Nov 07, 2005 4:25 pm I remember coming across this website a while ago- It appears there has been quite a bit of extensive research into this, and you may find it helpful: http://kaworu.com/kaworu/controversy/

[]: Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Nov 07, 2005 4:45 pm Heidroch wrote: I remember coming across this website a while ago- It appears there has been quite a bit of extensive research into this, and you may find it helpful: http://kaworu.com/kaworu/controversy/

[]: ^_^ \/,, Post by chiefen » Mon Nov 07, 2005 4:55 pm poetic_assassin wrote: Heidroch wrote: I remember coming across this website a while ago- It appears there has been quite a bit of extensive research into this, and you may find it helpful: http://kaworu.com/kaworu/controversy/

[]: Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 07, 2005 4:56 pm I think that Kaworu isn't human and jugding him by human standards is probly wrong.

[]: Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Nov 07, 2005 5:00 pm 'Cause he is my favorite character and that isn't my favorite answer.

[]: Post by Heidroch » Mon Nov 07, 2005 5:00 pm I think that Kawarou does indeed love Shinji, but it is form of love that is way above and beyond anything romantic.

[]: Post by Shnooks » Mon Nov 07, 2005 5:53 pm Yeah, well, if he was human, he'd be gay. You know, as gay as rainbows and shit. But, since he's not human, its more of a, like...whats it called? All-loving emotion. Like, Angels and God, they just love everyone.

[]: Post by Defectron » Mon Nov 07, 2005 7:10 pm So, let us through another detail foward, Lillith. Adam and Lillith certainly had some sexual affairs. So would the fact that Adam, or Kaworu, having love for both men and woman make him bisexual? Possible but also consider that many homosexual men have sex with women to deny the fact that they are homosexual. Adam may be doing something like that because afterall, he is both an angel and a human at the same time.

[]: Post by Eternal Yamcha » Mon Nov 07, 2005 7:34 pm He's gay in the sense that he's happy. Indeed, he really is gay in that sense. Now, is he gay in the sense that he wants to have sexual relations with a man? Eh... I don't know. I seriously doubt it. I don't think he really thinks about having sexual relations with another person, much less, another man. Sleeping with another person can be viewed as an expression of love... I don't know how, but it can be viewed that way. Screw it, my mind STILL isn't working today. I'll sum it up, I do not thinking Kaworu is homosexual, maybe bisexual, but that's because he just doesn't give a shit. I believe he just loves Shinji... That's all that really matters.

[]: Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Nov 07, 2005 9:25 pm Defectron wrote: So, let us through another detail foward, Lillith. Adam and Lillith certainly had some sexual affairs. So would the fact that Adam, or Kaworu, having love for both men and woman make him bisexual? Possible but also consider that many homosexual men have sex with women to deny the fact that they are homosexual. Adam may be doing something like that because afterall, he is both an angel and a human at the same time.

[]: Post by rei-freak » Mon Nov 07, 2005 9:36 pm He is bisexual in my opinion

[]: Post by Oblivious » Mon Nov 07, 2005 11:14 pm rei-is-hot wrote: He is bisexual in my opinion

[]: Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 07, 2005 11:19 pm I've anted to use angel boy in a fic myself, but some how I think I won't be as kind to him as you might be. :twisted:

[]: Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Nov 08, 2005 12:02 pm check these out: [url]http://www.gainaxpages.com/videogames/lgos81.jpg[/url] [url]http://www.gainaxpages.com/videogames/lgos46.jpg[/url] [url]http://www.gainaxpages.com/videogames/lgos29.jpg[/url] they are from the girlfriend from steel 2nd game I think the answer is clear :P

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:16 pm And he does dodge the issue, giving the impression of denying it, but not actually doing so, when Asuka calls him "homo-boy" in the "Addition" radio drama.

[]: Post by superdoughboy4 » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:21 pm Tsu-chan wrote: I want to put this foward right now. Kaworu is certainly a peculiar character in Neon Genesis: Evangelion. He betrays Shinji and turns out to be his enemy. But, something that still puzles all fans alike is, "How does he love Shinji?" Kaworu is Adam, Adam was described by Gendou in episode 8 as, "The first human." Humans can have sexual status and gender. Thus, Kaworu is both angel and human. So, Kaworu can have a gender, he is male. So, he can have a sexual status. But is it a "love for everyone" type of love that Kaworu has or a lover's love? Well, we do have a couple hints of what it could be. So, what makes Kaworu's love a "lover's" love? For one, he makes sexual moves towards Shinji. Shinji: "I am going to bed." Kaworu: "With me?"
